name: agents-static-roster-metadata
description: AGENT_SUMMARIES is static role/goal metadata kept separate from build_agents() so listing the roster (the TUI home screen) never requires a configured LLM provider.
invariants: agent_summaries() must stay side-effect free — no LLM construction, no env reads
contracts: Returns list[dict] with 'role' and 'goal' keys for all seven roles including the manager
